## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Gitpod's evolving needs and explore how GrowthX can better support their upcoming rebranding and product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Gitpod is rebranding to ONA in September, launching a new software engineering agent and expanding platform capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes a 3-month contract renewal with a strategy sprint to realign efforts and improve content quality](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [Technical expertise is needed for content creation; GrowthX will involve developers in the loop and provide examples of work with similar clients](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [GrowthX offers support for the rebranding process, including content migration and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

## Topics

### Current Challenges with Content Creation

  - [Quality calibration issues, particularly for SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Need for subject matter expertise in technical writing](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Internal expectations for shareable, high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Difficulty in maintaining Gitpod's tone and voice in outsourced content](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Gitpod's Upcoming Changes

  - [Announcing a new software engineering agent called ONA tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Rebranding from Gitpod to ONA in September](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [Expanding platform capabilities, focusing on secure development for regulated industries](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Migrating website to Next.js and adding a CMS](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solutions

  - [Implement a strategy sprint to reset and realign efforts](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [Involve technical developers in the content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Provide examples of work done for similar technical clients](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Offer support for the rebranding and migration process](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Explore new content types (e.g., docs, glossaries, tutorials) that align with Gitpod's needs](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)

### Contract and Pricing Discussion

  - [Proposed 3-month contract renewal at $9K per month (discounted from standard $15K starting rate)](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)
  - [Focus on proving ROI and value to Gitpod's finance team](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Flexibility in approach to meet Gitpod's changing needs](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send examples and materials showcasing work with technical clients](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Talia to create an internal memo and discuss the 3-month renewal with Gitpod's CFO](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Schedule a kickoff meeting for next week to begin the strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare a transition guide and support for the rebranding process](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Explore opportunities to improve Gitpod's domain authority and SEO performance post-rebranding](https://fathom.video/share/3w6EfSEMwo5dao2PrsZyRPkjcdjyugxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
